pick-issue.template: Use the forklift-issue-picker skill to pick the next open issue from GitHub, create a feature branch, and prepare a PR.
pick-issue.description: Pick the next Forklift issue and create a feature branch + PR

review-pr.template: Review PR $ARGUMENTS. Fetch the PR diff, read full file context, and check for bugs, logic errors, security issues, and edge cases. Output a structured review with severity per issue.
